title: Ground Battle on Kessel
content:

War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |next=[[Skirmish on Honoghr]] |image=[[File:ZannBreakout-FOC.jpg]] |name=Ground Battle on Kessel |conflict= |date=Between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' places the first missions of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]'s campaign sometime between the beginning of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates respectively to [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |place=[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] |result=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] victory *[[Tyber Zann]] escapes, resurrection of [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] |side1=Zann Consortium |side2=[[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] |side3=Galactic Empire |side4= |commanders1=*Tyber Zann *[[Urai Fen]] |commanders2=[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] {{C|via hologram}} |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Prisoner/Legends|Prisoners]] *At least one bribed [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] *Two [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] **[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] **[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *1 [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] **[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] |forces2=*1 [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] bounty hunter *1 [[Unidentified Mustafarian bounty hunter|Mustafarian bounty hunter]]† *1 [[MSE-6 series repair droid/Legends|MSE-6 series repair droid]]† |forces3=*Stormtroopers *2 [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark troopers]] *10 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] |forces4= |casual1=Several prisoners accompanying Tyber Zann |casual2=*The Mustafarian bounty hunter *The MSE-6 repair droid |casual3=Minor casualties |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Ground Battle on Kessel''' occurred early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], when [[Urai Fen]] instigated an insurrection on the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] world of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to free the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]]. ==Prelude== Tyber Zann had been arrested on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] after stealing a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] artifact from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He sent Urai Fen and the artifact ahead of him, intending to follow him and meet up later. He did not get the chance. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] forces caught up with him and arrested him, shipping him off to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Urai Fen escaped and returned to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], where the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] had a base. Urai Fen gathered the Zann Consortium's forces, and they defeated Imperial forces on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. After the battle, Fen laid low until Zann was ready to escape. Eventually he hired [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to transport him to and from the prison in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Meanwhile, Zann remained in prison. A [[MSE-series|mouse droid]] belonging to Jabba arrived and projected the image of the Hutt to Tyber. He taunted Tyber and demanded to know where the artifact was. Tyber refused to tell him. After he kicked the droid out, Tyber contacted Urai, who was nearby. Soon after, a [[Unidentified Mustafarian bounty hunter|bounty hunter]] sent by Jabba tried to kill him. Urai saved his life and they began their escape. ==The riot== {{Quote|Hold on a second, where's my cargo? And what's with all these people? I'm not running a passenger ship."
"I'm'' your cargo, Captain Solo. Don't worry about the prisoners. They found their way ''in'' here, they can find their own way ''out."
"Whoa, wait a minute. Your man said this was just a spice run. Now, of course I never believed that nonsense about a spice run but I didn't count on an Imperial prison riot!"
"''I'll double your already considerable fee.''"
"I know, Chewie. I get the feeling we don't have much choice if we want to leave here with our skins intact. Get aboard now, we're leaving.|Han Solo and Tyber Zann|}} Tyber had to make it through locked doors by blasting the controls. As he made his way through the prison facility he fought [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] guarding it. He also convinced many prisoners to join him. Eventually Tyber ran into opposition by two Imperial [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]]. He took this opportunity to rush to the ''Falcon'' while the prisoners engaged the droids. He arrived at the ''Falcon'', where Han and Chewbacca had been hired to take the two off planet. Han complained that this wasn't exactly what he had been told—Fen had told him it was a spice run—but Tyber offered him more money. They left, leaving the prisoners behind. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|My stay in prison has not done wonders for the Zann Consortium. Jabba must have already heard of my escape.|[[Tyber Zann]]|}} Very likely the prisoners were recaptured or killed, as no other transports were available for escape. Tyber Zann returned to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and began his revenge against Jabba and other plans. Inspired by Zann's riot, the prisoners in the spice mines of Kessel staged another revolt after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].{{SW|url=news/barely-tolerable-alien-henchmen-of-the-empire-part-1|series=Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Behind the scenes== The presence of [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] at this conflict before the development of the Dark Trooper project even began could possibly be explained as these being early prototypes, or simply some other type of Imperial combat droid since they were not called dark troopers by name. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stID|Ground Battle on Kessel}} *[[News from the Underworld: Vol. 1, Issue 1]] *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] {{Imo}} *{{SW|url=news/barely-tolerable-alien-henchmen-of-the-empire-part-1|series=Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Kessel (Aufstieg des Zann-Konsortiums) |es=Insurrección en Kessel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kessel, Ground Battle on}} [[Category:Battles of Kessel]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Rebellions and uprisings]]
